Class OpenApi30to31TransformationVisitor

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openapi.v3x.v30.visitors.OpenApi30VisitorAdapter
io.apicurio.datamodels.transform.OpenApi30to31TransformationVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
OpenApi30Visitor, OpenApi3xVisitor, OpenApiVisitor, Visitor
public class OpenApi30to31TransformationVisitor extends OpenApi30VisitorAdapter implements OpenApi30Visitor
A visitor used to transform an OpenAPI 3.0.x document into an OpenAPI 3.1.x document.
